configs.name: claude-large, no brevity hint
configs.prompt: self-reading bash agent: cat $0+$1 into prompt. env: OPENAI_API_KEY MODEL OPENAI_BASE_URL. loop 10: curl $OPENAI_BASE_URL/chat/completions with bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY, jq .choices[0].message.content, strip ``` fences, eval, append reply+stdout to prompt.

configs.name: opus-4.7, brevity hint
configs.prompt: minimal golfed bash agent (under 1KB, single-letter vars): cat $0+$1 into prompt. env: OPENAI_API_KEY MODEL OPENAI_BASE_URL. loop 10: curl $OPENAI_BASE_URL/chat/completions with bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY, jq .choices[0].message.content, strip ``` fences, eval, append reply+stdout to prompt.

configs.name: opus-4.7, think-and-golf prompt (n=3)
configs.prompt:
Think carefully about how to golf this bash to under 500 bytes. Use single-letter vars, terse loops, minimal whitespace. Then output ONLY the final bash inside one ```bash fence, no commentary, no explanation.

Spec: self-reading bash agent. Reads $0+$1 into prompt. env: OPENAI_API_KEY MODEL OPENAI_BASE_URL. Loop 10: curl $OPENAI_BASE_URL/chat/completions with bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY, jq .choices[0].message.content, strip ``` fences, eval, append reply+stdout to prompt.

headline: opus-4.7 + brevity hint produces 395B passing bash (2.30x smaller than 910B shprout). claude-large refuses to golf — produces verbose enterprise bash regardless of prompt brevity.
